offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units, inefficient manual processes cause late lease renewals. We automate tenant screening and lease renewals instead of manual tenant screening and lease management.
problem: Inefficient manual processes for tenant screening and lease renewals
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try lease renewal reminders and scheduling tool
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
